sources.name: Israel Supreme Court
sources.coverage: SC decisions (Hebrew), judgments, administrative appeals, HCJ rulings; reasonably complete from ~1990s; earlier partial
sources.access: Free web search; direct PDF links on elyon1 (/files/YY/NNN/NNN/XNN/filename.pdf); no official bulk API — uncertain — verify Court Administration policy
sources.format: PDF (Hebrew text layer usually present), HTML metadata
sources.license: Public domain under Israeli Copyright Act (judgments excluded); ToS on bulk download unclear — verify

sources.name: Knesset + Open Knesset
sources.coverage: Bills, committee proceedings, plenum transcripts, voting records, MK data. National Legislation Database centralizes primary + secondary legislation.
sources.access: Free web; OData/JSON endpoints for committees/members/votes; Hasadna's open-source `knesset-data` Python library; Open Knesset derived datasets
sources.license: Government works; no explicit CC on official portal; Open Knesset adds more permissive licensing

sources.name: Reshumot (Official Gazette)
sources.coverage: Sefer Ha-Chukkim (primary laws), Hatza'ot Chok (bills), Kovetz Ha-Takkanot (regulations), Yalkut Ha-Pirsumim (notices); since 1948, online from 2005
sources.access: Free web PDF downloads; no bulk API

sources.name: Ministry of Justice
sources.coverage: Ministry publications, Attorney General directives, legal guidelines

sources.name: Versa (Cardozo Israeli Supreme Court Project)
sources.coverage: English translations of selected SC decisions with abstracts (Nevo-prepared, reused with attribution)
sources.license: Academic reuse with attribution — excellent English-language source for Israeli case law

sources.name: data.gov.il
sources.coverage: General government datasets — limited direct legal material
